tasks.title: [Discord #general] Establish kanban workflow for all tasks
tasks.description:
Set up process to ensure all tasks from any channel are tracked on kanban board
- Auto-create tasks for every request
- Update status as work progresses
- Mark done when complete
- Use prefixes for context: [Discord], [DM], [Project X]
